## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what do you want to add or change? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? What's the current workaround? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the implementation at a high level. Where would the code live? What changes are needed? -->

## Affected Modules

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Hub (`hub/`)
- [ ] Trading engine (`app/`)
- [ ] Strategy (`app/strategies/`)
- [ ] TUI client (`clients/tui/`)
- [ ] CLI client (`clients/cli/`)
- [ ] Telegram bot (`clients/telegram/`)
- [ ] Web client (`clients/web/`)
- [ ] Smart contracts (`contracts/`)
